section.heading: Reference to chapter 1209

content.p: Provisions of law relating to service of members of reserve components on active duty are set forth in chapter 1209 of this title (beginning with section 12301).

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–337, div. A, title XVI, § 1662(e)(4), Oct. 5, 1994, 108 Stat. 2992.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 672 was renumbered section 12301 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Dec. 1, 1994, except as otherwise provided, see section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337, set out as a note under section 10001 of this title.
